__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Arnolfini Portrait,Poetics-Aristotle,Feather of Justice,Infin. Improb. Eng.,Mysterious Relic,Mysterious Relic
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 5 CIV Relics Awakened, Snail ATK +36; CIV Relics Awakened: 100/100
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
